title: Puddles!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Boots go *splat!*
I jump so high!
Water flies—
right in my eye!

[chorus]
Puddles! Puddles!
Big and bright!
Jump right in—
what a great sight!

[verse 2]
I’ll jump again!
Watch me spin!
One more splash—
let’s jump right in!

[chorus]
Puddles! Puddles!
Big and bright!
Jump right in—
what a great sight!

[ending]
Now I’m all wet,
but that’s okay!
Puddle fun—
I’ll jump all day!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, banjo, bass, and shaker, 125 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: Rain hammers the kitchen window at 4:33 p.m., and the second Mom flips the deadbolt, your yellow rain boots skid across the linoleum—arms flung wide, you shriek *"PUDDLES!"* and cannonball straight into the glistening sidewalk lake, sending up a perfect crown of silver spray.
cover_description: Kid in yellow boots mid-jump, silver splash flying up.
